subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servant who was touched by tribulation in the path of his Lord and ascended unto God at a time foreordained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده الذی مسته الباساء فی سبیل ربه و ارتقی الی الله حین الذی کان بایدی
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
